metadata.description: Component reliability tracking for Neuron project. Updated as features are implemented and tested.
metadata.updateFrequency: After each component completes implementation or testing

NeuronAccessibilityService.description: Core L5 NERVE layer - executes accessibility actions
NeuronAccessibilityService.notes: Service starts and binds correctly, event routing works. No unit tests for service itself (instrumentation needed).

UITreeReader.description: L2 PERCEPTION layer - reads UI tree and generates JSON
UITreeReader.notes: 9 tests passing. Prunes, serializes, handles depth limits. Tested on 2 devices.

ActionExecutor.description: L5 NERVE layer - executes NeuronAction objects (tap, type, swipe, scroll, global nav, launch)
ActionExecutor.notes: 22 tests passing. Multi-fallback launch works. On-device testing confirms basic actions.

SensitivityGate.description: L3 BRAIN layer - blocks sensitive actions (passwords, banking, editable fields with sensitive text)
SensitivityGate.notes: 24 tests passing. Editable-only text matching prevents false positives on label text. Banking packages, password fields, health apps all covered.

LLMRouter.description: L3 BRAIN layer - routes between T0-T4 LLM tiers with fallback chain
LLMRouter.notes: 8 tests passing. T2: Gemini→Ollama Cloud. T3: Ollama Cloud→NVIDIA→OpenRouter. 4-provider resilience.

IntentClassifier.description: L3 BRAIN layer - classifies command complexity → select tier
IntentClassifier.notes: 21 tests passing. Keyword heuristics for SIMPLE/MODERATE/COMPLEX + domain classification.

PlanAndExecuteEngine.description: L3 BRAIN layer - ReAct loop state machine for multi-step task execution
PlanAndExecuteEngine.notes: 9 tests passing. 16-test integration benchmark: 9/14 PASS (64%), 3 PARTIAL, 2 FAIL. Single-step 100%, multi-step limited by LLM latency.

WorkingMemory.description: L4 MEMORY layer - in-memory task state with SharedPreferences backup
WorkingMemory.notes: 11 tests passing. Current task, action history, screen state hash, serialization roundtrip.

NeuronBrainService.description: L3 BRAIN layer - foreground service hosting brain, command reception via broadcast + binder
NeuronBrainService.notes: Foreground service starts correctly, broadcast receiver works. No unit tests (requires instrumentation).

GeminiFlashClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - Gemini API client with 4-model fallback chain
GeminiFlashClient.notes: Works on-device when not rate-limited. 4-model chain (2.0-flash → 2.5-flash → 2.5-flash-lite → 2.0-flash-lite). Free tier: 20 req/day per model.

NvidiaQwenClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - NVIDIA NIM Qwen 3.5 client
NvidiaQwenClient.notes: API endpoint returns 404. Known server-side issue per NVIDIA forums. Added Accept header, still failing.

OpenRouterClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - OpenRouter client with free model fallback chain (Llama 3.3 70B, Gemma 3 27B)
OpenRouterClient.notes: Working on-device. Llama 3.3 70B: ~3s latency, valid action JSON. 50 req/day free. Last resort T3 fallback.

OllamaCloudClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - Ollama Cloud Qwen3-VL 235B thinking model
OllamaCloudClient.notes: 16-test benchmark: primary provider for all tests. Action selection accuracy 86-93%. Latency 8-17s. Handles app launches, navigation, basic taps. Struggles with obfuscated IDs and multi-step state tracking.

MCP_Server.description: Protocol Bus - Python MCP server on localhost:7384

OverlayManager.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - renders overlay UI and handles TTS
